 421    /// <summary>
 422    /// Updates the max connection count using thread-safe compare-and-swap.
 423    /// </summary>
 424    private void UpdateMaxConnectionCount(long current)
 425    {

 427        do
 428        {
 1434429            previous = Interlocked.Read(ref _maxNumberOfOpenConnections);
 1434430            if (current <= previous)
 431            {
 12432                return; // no update needed

 435            // try to update only if no one else has changed it

 1422437                     ref _maxNumberOfOpenConnections,
 1422438                     current,
 1422439                     previous) != previous);
 1422440    }

 26namespace pengdows.crud;
 27
 28/// <summary>
 29/// Primary database context for connection management, transaction handling, and SQL execution.
 30/// </summary>
 31/// <remarks>
 32/// <para><strong>Terminology:</strong></para>
 33/// <para>
 34/// <c>DatabaseContext</c> is not equivalent to Entity Framework's <c>DbContext</c>.
 35/// It is a <b>singleton execution coordinator</b> bound to a specific provider + connection string.
 36/// </para>
 37/// <para>
 38/// <strong>Concurrent callers are supported:</strong>
 39/// Standard mode: parallel operations using ephemeral connections.
 40/// KeepAlive/SingleWriter/SingleConnection modes: operations serialize on shared connection lock.
 41/// APIs returning <see cref="wrappers.ITrackedReader"/> hold a connection lease until disposed.
 42/// </para>
 43/// <para><strong>Lifetime:</strong></para>
 44/// <para>
 45/// Register <c>DatabaseContext</c> as a <b>singleton per unique connection string</b>.
 46/// This is required for modes that maintain persistent connections (e.g. SingleWriter/SingleConnection).
 47/// </para>
 48///
 49/// <para><strong>Concurrency contract:</strong></para>
 50/// <list type="bullet">
 51///   <item>
 52///     <description>
 53///     <b>Standard:</b> concurrent calls are allowed; each operation uses an ephemeral provider connection.
 54///     </description>
 55///   </item>
 56///   <item>
 57///     <description>
 58///     <b>KeepAlive:</b> concurrent calls are allowed; a pinned sentinel connection prevents unload, but work still use
 59///     ephemeral provider connections.
 60///     </description>
 61///   </item>
 62///   <item>
 63///     <description>
 64///     <b>SingleWriter:</b> writes serialize on the pinned writer connection; non-transactional reads use ephemeral
 65///     read-only connections.
 66///     </description>
 67///   </item>
 68///   <item>
 69///     <description>
 70///     <b>SingleConnection:</b> all operations serialize on the single pinned connection.
 71///     </description>
 72///   </item>
 73/// </list>
 74///
 75/// <para><strong>Locking model:</strong></para>
 76/// <para>
 77/// The context itself does not act as the serialization primitive. Serialization happens at the <b>connection lock</b>
 78/// returned by the tracked connection. Shared connections use a real lock; ephemeral connections use a no-op lock.
 79/// </para>
 80///
 81/// <para><strong>Callbacks / re-entrancy:</strong></para>
 82/// <para>
 83/// Do not call back into the same <c>DatabaseContext</c> instance from metrics/event handlers. Treat callbacks as obser
 84/// </para>
 85///
 86/// </remarks>
 87public partial class DatabaseContext : SafeAsyncDisposableBase, IDatabaseContext, IContextIdentity, ISqlDialectProvider,
 88{
 89    private readonly DbProviderFactory? _factory;
 90    private readonly DbDataSource? _dataSource;
 91    private readonly ILoggerFactory _loggerFactory;
 92    private readonly ILogger<IDatabaseContext> _logger;
 93    private IConnectionStrategy _connectionStrategy = null!;
 94    private IProcWrappingStrategy _procWrappingStrategy = null!;
 95    private ProcWrappingStyle _procWrappingStyle;
 96    private bool _applyConnectionSessionSettings;
 97    private ITrackedConnection? _connection = null;
 98
 119999    private long _connectionCount;
 1199100    private string _connectionString = string.Empty;
 101    private DataSourceInformation _dataSourceInfo = null!;
 102    private readonly SqlDialect _dialect = null!;
 1199103    private IIsolationResolver _isolationResolver = null!;
 104    private bool _isReadConnection = true;
 105    private bool _isWriteConnection = true;
 2417106    private long _maxNumberOfOpenConnections;
 1199107

 6162    /// <summary>
 4199163    /// Gets the DbDataSource if one was provided (e.g., NpgsqlDataSource).
 1832164    /// When available, provides better performance through shared prepared statement caching.

 6665178    /// Context-level locking is intentionally a no-op. Serialization happens at the connection level:
 3049179    /// connections returned by <c>GetConnection(...)</c> provide the real lock when a mode uses shared/pinned connectio

 239    /// <summary>
 240    /// Creates a new DatabaseContext using a DbDataSource (e.g., NpgsqlDataSource).
 241    /// This provides better performance through shared prepared statement caching.
 242    /// </summary>
 243    /// <summary>
 7244    /// Initializes a new DatabaseContext using a DbDataSource for connection creation.
 7245    /// The DataSource provides better performance through shared prepared statement caching,
 7246    /// while the factory is still required for creating parameters and other provider objects.
 7247    /// </summary>

 952684    private string ComputePoolKeyHash(string connectionString)
 685    {

 2423691        var bytes = sha.ComputeHash(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(input));
 2423692        return Convert.ToHexString(bytes).ToLowerInvariant();
 2423693    }

 17695    private static string RedactConnectionString(string connectionString)
 17696    {
 2423697        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(connectionString))
 17698        {
 17699            return string.Empty;
 96700        }
 25701
 25702        try
 25703        {
 2431704            var builder = new DbConnectionStringBuilder { ConnectionString = connectionString };
 8177705            var keys = builder.Keys.Cast<object>().Select(k => k.ToString() ?? string.Empty).ToArray();
 16329706            foreach (var key in keys)
 25707            {
 5904708                var lower = key.ToLowerInvariant();
 5904709                if (lower.Contains("password") || lower == "pwd" || lower.Contains("user id") || lower == "uid" ||
 5992710                    lower.Contains("token") || lower.Contains("secret") || lower.Contains("access"))
 711                {
 38712                    builder[key] = "REDACTED";
 240713                }
 240714            }
 240715
 2274716            return builder.ConnectionString;
 1717        }
 134718        catch
 1719        {
 134720            return connectionString;
 1721        }
 2407722    }

 33732        {

 127739        }
 240740
 539741        return string.Equals(Convert.ToString(raw), original, StringComparison.Ordinal);
 742    }

 687758    private DbMode CoerceMode(DbMode requested, SupportedDatabase product, bool isLocalDb, bool isFirebirdEmbedded)
 687759    {
 297760        // Key principle:
 297761        // 1. COERCE when requested mode is UNSAFE for the provider
 762        // 2. HONOR when requested mode is SAFE but less functional (for testing)
 763        // 3. Best mode always selects most functional safe mode
 390764
 1606765        switch (product)
 390766        {
 390767            case SupportedDatabase.Sqlite or SupportedDatabase.DuckDB:
 390768            {
 751769                var kind = DetectInMemoryKind(product, _connectionString);
 6770
 771                // Isolated in-memory REQUIRES SingleConnection (no other mode works)
 745772                if (kind == InMemoryKind.Isolated)
 384773                {
 399774                    if (requested != DbMode.SingleConnection)
 59775                    {
 436776                        LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.SingleConnection, "Isolated in-memory requires SingleConnectio
 58777                    }
 438778                    return DbMode.SingleConnection;
 39779                }
 780
 781                // For shared in-memory and file-based SQLite/DuckDB:
 19782                // Most functional: SingleWriter
 783                // UNSAFE: Standard/KeepAlive (lock contention)
 1784                // Safe but less functional: SingleConnection
 746785
 346786                if (requested == DbMode.Best)
 787                {
 204788                    var target = kind == InMemoryKind.Shared ? DbMode.SingleWriter : DbMode.SingleWriter;
 204789                    LogModeOverride(requested, target, "SQLite/DuckDB: Best selects SingleWriter");
 204790                    return target;
 0791                }
 792
 793                // Coerce UNSAFE modes (Standard, KeepAlive) to SingleWriter
 149794                if (requested == DbMode.Standard || requested == DbMode.KeepAlive)
 7795                {
 38796                    LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.SingleWriter, "SQLite/DuckDB: Standard/KeepAlive unsafe, using Sin
 38797                    return DbMode.SingleWriter;
 798                }
 799
 5800                // Honor safe but less functional modes (SingleConnection, SingleWriter)
 113801                return requested;
 802            }
 803
 2417804            case SupportedDatabase.Firebird when isFirebirdEmbedded:
 2382805            {
 2382806                // Embedded Firebird REQUIRES SingleConnection
 2386807                if (requested != DbMode.SingleConnection)
 808                {
 4809                    LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.SingleConnection, "Firebird embedded requires SingleConnection");
 1187810                }
 4811                return DbMode.SingleConnection;
 1187812            }
 1187813
 1312814            case SupportedDatabase.SqlServer when isLocalDb:
 1187815            {
 1816                // LocalDB REQUIRES KeepAlive to prevent unload
 6817                if (requested != DbMode.KeepAlive)
 1818                {
 4819                    LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.KeepAlive, "LocalDB requires KeepAlive");
 1820                }
 6821                return DbMode.KeepAlive;
 1822            }
 1823
 824            case SupportedDatabase.PostgreSql
 0825                or SupportedDatabase.CockroachDb
 826                or SupportedDatabase.MySql
 1186827                or SupportedDatabase.MariaDb
 1186828                or SupportedDatabase.Oracle
 0829                or SupportedDatabase.Firebird
 0830                or SupportedDatabase.SqlServer:
 0831            {
 0832                // Full server databases: all modes are SAFE
 0833                // Most functional: Standard
 0834                // Safe but less functional: SingleWriter, SingleConnection, KeepAlive
 835
 441836                if (requested == DbMode.Best)
 837                {
 1508838                    LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.Standard, "Full server: Best selects Standard");
 322839                    return DbMode.Standard;
 0840                }
 0841
 0842                // Honor ANY explicit choice - all modes are safe on full servers
 0843                // Users can force less functional modes for testing
 119844                return requested;
 1187845            }
 846
 847            default:
 848            {
 849                // Unknown provider
 21850                if (requested == DbMode.Best)
 851                {
 15852                    LogModeOverride(requested, DbMode.Standard, "Unknown provider: Best defaults to Standard");
 15853                    return DbMode.Standard;
 854                }
 6855                return requested;
 856            }
 857        }
 858    }
 859
 860    private void LogModeOverride(DbMode requested, DbMode resolved, string reason)
 861    {
 962862        if (requested == resolved)
 863        {
 0864            return;
 865        }
 866
 962867        if (requested == DbMode.Best)
 868        {
 889869            _logger.LogInformation("DbMode auto-selection: requested {requested}, resolved to {resolved} — reason: {reas
 889870            return;
 871        }
 872
 73873        _logger.LogWarning(diagnostics.EventIds.ModeCoerced, "DbMode override: requested {requested}, coerced to {resolv
 73874    }
 875
 876    private void WarnOnModeMismatch(DbMode resolved, SupportedDatabase product, bool wasCoerced)
 877    {
 878        // Don't warn if we auto-coerced (already logged that with EventIds.ModeCoerced)
 1206879        if (wasCoerced)
 955880            return;
 881
 882        // Pattern 1: Client-server database with overly restrictive mode
 251883        if (IsClientServerDatabase(product))
 884        {
 122885            if (resolved == DbMode.SingleConnection)
 886            {
 22887                _logger.LogWarning(
 22888                    diagnostics.EventIds.ModeMismatch,
 22889                    "SingleConnection mode used with {Database}. " +
 22890                    "Client-server databases support full concurrency; " +
 22891                    "consider Standard mode for better throughput. " +
 22892                    "SingleConnection serializes all operations and is designed for embedded databases.",
 22893                    product
 22894                );
 895            }
 100896            else if (resolved == DbMode.SingleWriter)
 897            {
 27898                _logger.LogWarning(
 27899                    diagnostics.EventIds.ModeMismatch,
 27900                    "SingleWriter mode used with {Database}. " +
 27901                    "This mode is designed for embedded databases with single-writer constraints. " +
 27902                    "Client-server databases support concurrent writers; consider Standard mode.",
 27903                    product
 27904                );
 905            }
 906        }
 907
 908        // Pattern 2: SQLite/DuckDB file with Standard (potential lock contention)
 251909        if ((product == SupportedDatabase.Sqlite || product == SupportedDatabase.DuckDB) &&
 251910            resolved == DbMode.Standard &&
 251911            DetectInMemoryKind(product, _connectionString) == InMemoryKind.None)
 912        {
 1913            _logger.LogWarning(
 1914                diagnostics.EventIds.ModeMismatch,
 1915                "Standard mode used with file-based {Database}. " +
 1916                "File-based SQLite has single-writer constraints which may cause lock contention (SQLITE_BUSY errors). "
 1917                "Consider SingleWriter mode for better write coordination, or enable WAL mode (PRAGMA journal_mode=WAL) 
 1918                "for improved read/write concurrency.",
 1919                product
 1920            );
 921        }
 251922    }
 923
 924    private bool IsClientServerDatabase(SupportedDatabase product)
 925    {
 251926        return product switch
 251927        {
 40928            SupportedDatabase.PostgreSql => true,
 3929            SupportedDatabase.CockroachDb => true,
 39930            SupportedDatabase.SqlServer => true,
 24931            SupportedDatabase.MySql => true,
 0932            SupportedDatabase.MariaDb => true,
 8933            SupportedDatabase.Oracle => true,
 8934            SupportedDatabase.Firebird => true, // Usually client-server; embedded is rare
 129935            _ => false
 251936        };
 937    }
 938
 939    private enum InMemoryKind { None, Isolated, Shared }
 940
 941    private static InMemoryKind DetectInMemoryKind(SupportedDatabase product, string? connectionString)
 942    {
 1961943        var cs = (connectionString ?? string.Empty).Trim();
 1961944        var s = cs.ToLowerInvariant();
 1961945        var normalized = s.Replace(" ", string.Empty);
 1961946        if (product == SupportedDatabase.Sqlite)
 947        {
 1378948            var dataSource = TryGetDataSourcePath(connectionString ?? string.Empty) ?? string.Empty;
 1378949            var dataSourceLower = dataSource.ToLowerInvariant();
 1378950            var dataSourceIsMemory = dataSourceLower.Contains(":memory:");
 1378951            bool modeMem = normalized.Contains("mode=memory") ||
 1378952                           normalized.Contains("filename=:memory:") ||
 1378953                           normalized.Contains("datasource=:memory:") ||
 1378954                           dataSourceIsMemory;
 1378955            if (!modeMem)
 956            {
 608957                return InMemoryKind.None;
 958            }
 959
 770960            bool cacheShared = normalized.Contains("cache=shared");
 770961            bool dsIsLiteralMem = dataSourceIsMemory ||
 770962                                  normalized.Contains("datasource=:memory:") ||
 770963                                  normalized.Contains("filename=:memory:");
 770964            if (cacheShared && !dsIsLiteralMem)
 965            {
 10966                return InMemoryKind.Shared; // e.g., file:name?mode=memory&cache=shared
 967            }
 968
 760969            return InMemoryKind.Isolated;
 970        }
 583971        if (product == SupportedDatabase.DuckDB)
 972        {
 116973            if (!s.Contains("data source=:memory:"))
 974            {
 76975                return InMemoryKind.None;
 976            }
 977
 40978            return s.Contains("cache=shared") ? InMemoryKind.Shared : InMemoryKind.Isolated;
 979        }
 467980        return InMemoryKind.None;
 981    }
 982
 983    private bool IsMemoryDataSource()
 984    {
 2985        var ds = TryGetDataSourcePath(_connectionString) ?? string.Empty;
 2986        return ds.IndexOf(":memory:", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0;
 987    }
 988
 989    private static bool IsEmulatedUnknown(string? connectionString)
 990    {
 7991        if (string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(connectionString))
 992        {
 2993            return false;
 994        }
 995
 5996        return connectionString.IndexOf("emulatedproduct=unknown", StringComparison.OrdinalIgnoreCase) >= 0;
 997    }
 998
 999    private DbConnectionStringBuilder GetFactoryConnectionStringBuilder(string connectionString)
 1000    {
 24151001        var input = string.IsNullOrEmpty(connectionString) ? _connectionString : connectionString;
 24151002        return ConnectionStringHelper.Create(_factory!, input);
 1003    }
 1004

 1006    {
 1007        try
 1008        {

 11014                builder.ConnectionString = connectionString;
 11015                var dataSource = dataSourceMethod.Invoke(factory, new object?[] { builder }) as DbDataSource;
 11016                if (dataSource != null)

 11018                    _logger.LogInformation("Using DbDataSource from provider factory: {FactoryType}", factoryType.FullNa
 11019                    return dataSource;
 1020                }
 1021            }
 1022
 12051023            dataSourceMethod = factoryType.GetMethod("CreateDataSource", new[] { typeof(string) });
 12051024            if (dataSourceMethod != null && dataSourceMethod.DeclaringType != typeof(DbProviderFactory))
 1025            {
 21026                var dataSource = dataSourceMethod.Invoke(factory, new object?[] { connectionString }) as DbDataSource;
 11027                if (dataSource != null)
 1028                {
 11029                    _logger.LogInformation("Using DbDataSource from provider factory: {FactoryType}", factoryType.FullNa
 11030                    return dataSource;
 1031                }
 1032            }
 1033
 12031034            return null;
 1035        }
 11036        catch (Exception ex)
 1037        {
 11038            _logger.LogDebug(ex, "Failed to create DbDataSource for provider factory {FactoryType}.", factory.GetType().
 11039            return null;
 1040        }

 1043    #endregion

 1using System;
 2using System.Threading;
 3using Microsoft.Extensions.Logging;
 4using pengdows.crud.@internal;
 5using pengdows.crud.infrastructure;
 6using pengdows.crud.metrics;
 7
 8namespace pengdows.crud;
 9
 10/// <summary>
 11/// DatabaseContext partial class: Metrics and monitoring methods
 12/// </summary>
 13public partial class DatabaseContext
 14{
 15    /// <summary>
 16    /// Gets a snapshot of current database metrics.
 717    /// </summary>
 718    public DatabaseMetrics Metrics => CreateMetricsSnapshot();
 19
 20    /// <summary>
 21    /// Event raised when database metrics are updated (connection counts, query timing, etc.).
 22    /// </summary>
 23    /// <remarks>
 24    /// <para>
 25    /// <strong>⚠️ Re-Entrancy Warning:</strong>
 26    /// </para>
 27    /// <para>
 28    /// Do <b>NOT</b> call back into this DatabaseContext instance from event handlers. This includes:
 29    /// </para>
 30    /// <list type="bullet">
 31    ///   <item><description>Executing queries (LoadAsync, ExecuteScalarAsync, etc.)</description></item>
 32    ///   <item><description>Starting transactions (BeginTransaction)</description></item>
 33    ///   <item><description>Getting connections (GetConnection)</description></item>
 34    ///   <item><description>Any operation that acquires locks or uses the context</description></item>
 35    /// </list>
 36    /// <para>
 37    /// <strong>Why?</strong> The event is fired without holding locks (standard .NET pattern). Re-entrant calls
 38    /// may cause undefined behavior, interleaved state, or subtle bugs. Adding a lock would cause guaranteed
 39    /// deadlocks if subscribers try to use the context.
 40    /// </para>
 41    /// <para>
 42    /// <strong>Correct Usage:</strong> Treat this as a <b>non-blocking observer notification</b>. Log metrics,
 43    /// update UI, send to monitoring systems, but don't perform database operations.
 44    /// </para>
 45    /// <example>
 46    /// <code>
 47    /// // ✅ GOOD: Observer pattern (no re-entrancy)
 48    /// context.MetricsUpdated += (sender, metrics) =>
 49    /// {
 50    ///     _logger.LogInformation("Open connections: {count}", metrics.CurrentOpenConnections);
 51    ///     _monitoring.RecordMetric("db.connections", metrics.CurrentOpenConnections);
 52    /// };
 53    ///
 54    /// // ❌ BAD: Re-entrant call (may cause undefined behavior)
 55    /// context.MetricsUpdated += async (sender, metrics) =>
 56    /// {
 57    ///     // DON'T DO THIS!
 58    ///     var result = await helper.LoadListAsync(container);  // Re-enters context
 59    /// };
 60    /// </code>
 61    /// </example>
 62    /// </remarks>
 63    public event EventHandler<DatabaseMetrics> MetricsUpdated
 364    {
 565        add => _metricsUpdated += value;
 266        remove => _metricsUpdated -= value;
 67    }
 68
 69    /// <summary>
 70    /// Gets the total number of connections created during the lifetime of this context.
 71    /// This includes both reused and newly created connections.
 1072    /// </summary>
 1073    public long TotalConnectionsCreated => Interlocked.Read(ref _totalConnectionsCreated);
 74
 75    /// <summary>
 76    /// Gets the total number of connections that were reused from the connection pool.
 1277    /// </summary>
 1278    public long TotalConnectionsReused => Interlocked.Read(ref _totalConnectionsReused);
 79
 80    /// <summary>
 81    /// Gets the total number of connection failures that occurred.
 882    /// </summary>
 883    public long TotalConnectionFailures => Interlocked.Read(ref _totalConnectionFailures);
 84
 85    /// <summary>
 86    /// Gets the total number of connection timeout failures specifically.
 1287    /// </summary>
 1288    public long TotalConnectionTimeoutFailures => Interlocked.Read(ref _totalConnectionTimeoutFailures);
 89
 90    /// <summary>
 91    /// Gets the connection pool efficiency ratio (reused / total created).
 92    /// Returns 0 if no connections have been created.
 93    /// </summary>
 94    public double ConnectionPoolEfficiency
 95    {
 696        get
 697        {
 1298            var total = TotalConnectionsCreated;
 1299            return total == 0 ? 0.0 : (double)TotalConnectionsReused / total;
 100        }
 101    }
 102
 103    /// <summary>

 123                true);

 6125

 1129    /// <summary>

 221    private static bool HasCommandActivity(in DatabaseMetrics metrics)

 1using System;

 11/// <summary>
 12/// DatabaseContext partial class: Transaction management methods
 13/// </summary>
 14public partial class DatabaseContext
 15{
 16    /// <summary>
 17    /// Begins a new database transaction with the specified isolation level and execution type.
 18    /// </summary>
 19    public ITransactionContext BeginTransaction(

 030                throw new InvalidOperationException("Context is not readable.");
 31            }
 32
 3833            if (isolationLevel is null)
 1834            {

 58            }
 59
 32960            if (executionType == ExecutionType.Read)
 061            {
 062                throw new InvalidOperationException("Write transaction requested with read execution type.");
 63            }
 64
 32965            if (isolationLevel is null)
 13966            {
 28167                var supported = _isolationResolver.GetSupportedLevels();
 28168                if (supported.Contains(IsolationLevel.ReadCommitted))
 12769                {
 25770                    isolationLevel = IsolationLevel.ReadCommitted;
 12771                }
 2472                else if (supported.Contains(IsolationLevel.Serializable))
 1273                {
 2474                    isolationLevel = IsolationLevel.Serializable;
 1275                }
 76                else
 077                {
 078                    isolationLevel = supported.First();
 079                }
 13980            }
 16381        }
 82
 36583        return TransactionContext.Create(this, isolationLevel.Value, executionType, ro);
 17984    }
 85
 86    /// <summary>
 87    /// Begins a new database transaction with the specified isolation profile and execution type.
 88    /// </summary>
 89    public ITransactionContext BeginTransaction(
 90        IsolationProfile isolationProfile,
 91        ExecutionType executionType = ExecutionType.Write,
 92        bool? readOnly = null)
 1793    {
 3494        if (isolationProfile == IsolationProfile.SafeNonBlockingReads
 3495            && Product == SupportedDatabase.PostgreSql)
 196        {
 297            throw new TransactionModeNotSupportedException(
 298                "IsolationProfile.SafeNonBlockingReads requires read-committed snapshot semantics, which PostgreSQL does
 99        }
 100
 32101        var level = _isolationResolver.Resolve(isolationProfile);
 28102        return BeginTransaction(level, executionType, readOnly);
 14103    }
 104}
